name: Jesse Watters Primetime
description: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across America to present news with a clear and direct approach.

name: Dig Deep or Cash Out
description: Rick returns to Vegas and gets a proposition from Parker; Tony hunts for missed gold in the Hester Cut; Parker's crew loses a truck at the worst time.

name: Deadline: White House
description: In-depth reporting on political developments and dynamic discussions with leading newsmakers, with insights into complex issues.

description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative with compelling interviews, lively debates and analysis of situations.

name: LSU at Tennessee
description: From Lindsey Nelson Stadium in Knoxville, Tenn.

description: From Augusta, Ga.

name: The Accountant
description: A Treasury agent (J.K. Simmons) closes in on a brilliant freelance accountant (Ben Affleck) who works for dangerous criminal organizations.

name: Courtside at the Women's Final Four: South Carolina vs. UConn
description: An alternative broadcast of the 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Final Four contests. From Mortgage Matchup Center in Phoenix.

name: Avengers: Age of Ultron
description: When Tony Stark's (Robert Downey Jr.) jumpstart of a dormant peacekeeping program goes awry, the Avengers must reassemble to battle a terrifying technological villain hell-bent on human extinction.

name: The Last Supper
description: An explosive final dinner in Italy fractures friendships as Beverly Hills braces for the fallout.

name: Moms, Best Friends and Helping Hands
description: After a million lottery win, a mother can now help her eldest daughter buy a starter home.

name: The Tenant Disassociation
description: Leonard decides to run against Sheldon for president of the tenants' association; Bernadette encourages Wolowitz and Koothrappali to find the owner of a drone after they find it in the backyard.

name: Smoker, Stove and Skewer
description: Guy Fieri is checking out all kinds of culinary, like a Las Vegas food truck smoking up monster sandwiches and a California comfort spot with pot pie; a Mediterranean joint's beef skewers and tandoori

name: P.T. & A
description: Ray's lie causes Debra to make a fashion statement to the members of the PTA.

name: The Equalizer
description: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

name: Grand Canyon
description: Sculpted by the elements, Grand Canyon National Park is a high-rise haven and a natural wonder; at every elevation, the park's wild inhabitants carve out a niche that gives them an edge.
